name: 🎬 streaming
description: Issues related to live streaming functionality, RTMP, multi-platform support

name: 📹 recording
description: Issues related to video recording, bitrate, codecs, file formats

name: 🎙️ audio
description: Issues related to audio processing, microphone, noise suppression, mixing

name: 🎨 rendering
description: Issues related to GPU rendering, OpenGL ES, scene composition, performance

name: 👾 vtuber
description: Issues related to Live2D Cubism support, VTuber features, animations

name: 🎭 scenes
description: Issues related to scene management, sources, templates, organization

name: ⚡ performance
description: Issues related to FPS, optimization, memory usage, battery drain, adaptive quality

name: 🔊 voice-chat
description: Issues related to voice chat, audio rooms, cross-app communication

name: 📱 android
description: Android-specific issues, API compatibility, device support, permissions

name: 🐛 bug
description: Something is broken or not working as expected

name: ✨ enhancement
description: New feature or request for improvement

name: 📚 documentation
description: Documentation, guides, tutorials, examples needed or improvements

name: 🚀 ui/ux
description: User interface, user experience, design improvements

name: 🔧 settings
description: Issues related to settings, configuration, preferences

name: 🌐 rtmp
description: Issues related to RTMP protocol, streaming servers, network

name: 📊 analytics
description: Statistics, metrics, performance monitoring, debugging info

name: 🎓 beginner-friendly
description: Good for contributors new to the project

name: ❓ question
description: Questions or need help (consider using discussions instead)

name: ⏱️ priority-high
description: High priority - needs urgent attention

name: 📋 priority-medium
description: Medium priority - should be addressed soon
